title: RedPacket2
description: Send red packets in your Minecraft server!
body:
# RedPacket2
Do you want to send a red packet to the player on your server?
Try this plugin!
# Installation
Download this plugin from [MCBBS](https://www.mcbbs.co/thread-3152-1-1.html)  
Download this plugin from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/redpacket2)  
Download this plugin from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/redpacket2)  
Drag and drop the JAR file into the `plugins` folder, and then restart the server.
# Requirements
Need [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
# Function
### Red Packet Type
It can set the type of red packet, such as: ordinary red packet, idioms red packet, password red packet.  
For a regular red packet, you just need to click on the prompt in the chat box to claim it.  
The idioms red packet require players to say idioms to claim them.  
Password red packet require players to say the corresponding password to claim them.  
### Give Type
There are two types of red packet given: one based on luck and the other fixed.  
### Red Packet Text
Ordinary red packet need to be set with red packet blessing messages.  
The relay red packet requires the setting of relay idioms.  
Password red packet need to set a red packet password.  
### Which Players Can Claim Red Packet
Click on the recipient in the chat box and enter the player's name (separated by ",") in the chat box.  
### The Money And Quantity Of Red Packet
Just set it up in the chat box.  
### The Last Step
Click "Create" in the chat box to send red packet.  
Click "Cancel" in the chat box to cancel the red packet Settings.  
# Usage
- `/rp add/new` - Create red packet  
- `/rp reload` - Reloading plugins  
# Permissions
| Permission | Description | Default |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| redpacket.admin | Administrator Permissions | op |
| redpacket.user | Player Permissions | false |
| redpacket.command.* | Plugin Command Permissions | op/false |
| redpacket.get.* | Get Red Packet | false |
| redpacket.set.* | Set Red Packet | false |
# Configuration
Edit configuration: `plugins/RedPacket/config.yml`  
- `Database-Type` Database type, supporting MySQL and Sqlite  
- `RedPacket-MaxAmount` The maximum number of red packet
- `RedPacket-MaxMoney` The maximum amount of red envelopes
- `RedPacket-MinMoney` Minimum amount of red envelope
- `RedPacket-Expired` Red packet expire automatically
# About RedPacket Plugins
I'm not the original author of this plugin. I mainly enabled this plugin to support versions 1.21-1.21.4  
The original author's Github: [sandtechnology](https://github.com/sandtechnology/RedPacket)  
Note: The original author has stopped updating this plugin!  
- To download versions **1.8-1.19.3** of the Red Packet plugin, please click the link[Minebbs - RedPacket](https://www.minebbs.com/resources/redpacket-x-x.9017/)
- To download versions **1.21-1.21.4** of the Red Packet 2 plugin, Is what you are watching!  
# Report The Problem
I'm a beginner in Java. The production of the plugin part relies on AI. Please understand!  
If you have any feedback, suggestions or find any errors in the plugin, please feel free to open [issues](https://github.com/xiaomian124/RedPacket2/issues) and let me know at any time, I'll do my best to solve it!
# License
